##RRUFFID=R110205
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Cu(UO_2_)_2_(AsO_4_)_2_·8H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Roter Berg District, Schneeberg District, Erzgebirge, Saxony, Germany
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott 
##DESCRIPTION=Pale green platy crystals associated with cobaltlotharmeyerite R070400. Cell parameters indicate that this has a disordered structure.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R110205
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 7.053 b: 7.053 c: 8.651 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 430.3 crystal system: tetragonal
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
